import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { useAuth } from '../../contexts/AuthContext'; import { LoadingSpinner } from '../../components/LoadingSpinner'; import { BarChart3, Users, Briefcase, FileText, Calendar, TrendingUp, Activity, Eye, UserCheck } from 'lucide-react'; const Analytics = () => { const { api } = useAuth(); const [stats, setStats] = useState({ users: { total: 0, students: 0, alumni: 0, admins: 0 }, jobs: { total: 0, active: 0, applications: 0 }, mous: { total: 0, active: 0, expired: 0 }, events: { total: 0, upcoming: 0, past: 0 }, notices: { total: 0, active: 0, pinned: 0 }, messages: { total: 0, unread: 0 } }); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); useEffect(() => { fetchAnalytics(); }, []); const fetchAnalytics = async () => { try { // Fetch user stats const userStats = await api.get('/users/stats'); const users = { total: userStats.data.totalUsers, students: userStats.data.roleStats.find(r => r._id === 'student')?.count || 0, alumni: userStats.data.roleStats.find(r => r._id === 'alumni')?.count || 0, admins: userStats.data.roleStats.find(r => r._id === 'admin')?.count || 0 }; // Fetch job stats const jobStats = await api.get('/jobs?limit=100'); const jobs = { total: jobStats.data.pagination.total, active: jobStats.data.jobs.filter(j => j.isActive).length, applications: jobStats.data.jobs.reduce((sum, job) => sum + job.applications.length, 0) }; // Fetch MOU stats const mouStats = await api.get('/mou/stats'); const mous = { total: mouStats.data.totalMOUs, active: mouStats.data.activeMOUs, expired: mouStats.data.expiredMOUs }; // Fetch event stats const eventStats = await api.get('/events?limit=100'); const now = new Date(); const events = { total: eventStats.data.pagination.total, upcoming: eventStats.data.events.filter(e => new Date(e.date) > now).length, past: eventStats.data.events.filter(e => new Date(e.date) <= now).length }; // Fetch notice stats const noticeStats = await api.get('/notices/stats'); const notices = { total: noticeStats.data.totalNotices, active: noticeStats.data.activeNotices, pinned: noticeStats.data.pinnedNotices }; // Fetch message stats const messageStats = await api.get('/messages?limit=1'); const messages = { total: messageStats.data.pagination.total, unread: messageStats.data.unreadCount }; setStats({ users, jobs, mous, events, notices, messages }); } catch (error) { console.error('Failed to fetch analytics:', error); } finally { setLoading(false); } }; if (loading) { return (
); } return (

Analytics Dashboard

System overview and usage statistics

{/* Overview Cards */}

Total Users

{stats.users.total}

Total Jobs

{stats.jobs.total}

Total MOUs

{stats.mous.total}

Total Events

{stats.events.total}

{/* Detailed Stats */}
{/* User Statistics */}

User Statistics

Students
{stats.users.students}
Alumni
{stats.users.alumni}
Admins
{stats.users.admins}
{/* Job Statistics */}

Job Statistics

Active Jobs
{stats.jobs.active}
Total Applications
{stats.jobs.applications}
Inactive Jobs
{stats.jobs.total - stats.jobs.active}
{/* MOU Statistics */}

MOU Statistics

Active MOUs
{stats.mous.active}
Expired MOUs
{stats.mous.expired}
Total MOUs
{stats.mous.total}
{/* Event Statistics */}

Event Statistics

Upcoming Events
{stats.events.upcoming}
Past Events
{stats.events.past}
Total Events
{stats.events.total}
{/* Additional Stats */}
{/* Notice Statistics */}

Notice Statistics

Active Notices
{stats.notices.active}
Pinned Notices
{stats.notices.pinned}
Total Notices
{stats.notices.total}
{/* Message Statistics */}

Message Statistics

Total Messages
{stats.messages.total}
Unread Messages
{stats.messages.unread}
Read Messages
{stats.messages.total - stats.messages.unread}
); }; export default Analytics;
